title: CMOA
wikitext:
[]: CMOA Post by CyberXIII » Thu May 21, 2009 12:31 pm What do you think was EVA's greatest crowning moment of awesome? In other words, what moment or scene made you want to cheer for a character? For me, it was Shinji brutalizing Zeruel. Forget about Eva-01 for a moment, this was all him. It almost made up for all the whining.

[]: Post by ZapX » Thu May 21, 2009 1:11 pm This was moved to http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=240799#240799 . I guess I should have left a shadow.
